mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hotword_seed (word, group_name, source, score, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{word}, #{groupName}, #{source}, #{score}, NOW(6), NOW(6)) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE score = VALUES(score), group_name = VALUES(group_name), updated_at = NOW(6)
mapper.select: SELECT id, word, group_name, source, score, created_at, updated_at FROM hotword_seed ORDER BY score DESC, updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
